usage: setSrouteMode [-help] [-reset] [-allowWrongWayRoute {true|false}] [-avoidOverCoreRowLayer <layerName>] [-blockPinConnectRingPinCorners {true|false}] [-blockPinRouteWithPinWidth {true|false}] [-connectBrokenCorePin {true|false}] [-corePinIgnoreObs {none|placement_blockage|overlap_obs|block_halo}] [-corePinJoinLimit <value>] [-corePinLength <value>] [-corePinLengthAsInstance {true|false}] [-corePinMaxViaScale <widthPct heightPct>] [-corePinReferenceMacro <macro>] [-corePinReferToFollowPin {true|false}] [-corePinSiteRailWidth {site name layer and width}] [-corePinSnapTo {M1_pin|opt_routing_track|grid|half_grid}] [-corePinStopRoute {RowEnd|CellPinEnd}] [-extendNearestTarget {true|false}] [-jogThresholdRatio <value>] [-layerNormalCost {layer1 cost1 layer2 cost2 ...}] [-layerWrongWayCost {layer1 cost1 layer2 cost2 ...}] [-padPinMinViaSize <percentage>] [-padPinSplit <width spacing>] [-padRingLefConvention {true|false}] [-secondaryPinMaxGap <value>] [-secondaryPinRailWidth <value>] [-signalPinAsPG {true|false}] [-splitLongVia {threshold step offset height}] [-srpgAonCellPin {cellName:pinName}] [-targetNumber <value>] [-targetSearchDistance <dist>] [-timeLimit <value>] [-treatEndcapAsCore {true|false}] [-treatWelltapAsEndcap <list of cells>] [-viaConnectToShape {padring|ring|stripe|blockring|blockpin|coverpin|noshape|blockwire|corewire|followpin|iowire}] [-viaThruToClosestRing {true|false}]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -allowWrongWayRoute
options.description: allow wrong way route

options.name: -avoidOverCoreRowLayer
options.description: specify number of layers to avoid routing over core row area

options.name: -blockPinConnectRingPinCorners
options.description: {true|false} Extend the ring pins at the corners

options.name: -blockPinRouteWithPinWidth
options.description: Connect using pin width only

options.name: -connectBrokenCorePin
options.description: Break followpin for standard cell pin or obs

options.name: -corePinIgnoreObs
options.description: {none|placement_blockage|overlap_obs|block_halo} ignore specified blockage when connecting follow pin

options.name: -corePinJoinLimit
options.description: gaps smaller than this variable cause followpin rails to be joined

options.name: -corePinLength
options.description: connect core pins of at least specified length

options.name: -corePinLengthAsInstance
options.description: connect core pins if their lengths are the same as the instances

options.name: -corePinMaxViaScale
options.description: <widthPct heightPct> Maximum via width and height at stripe crossover for standcell pins (%)

options.name: -corePinReferenceMacro
options.description: use specified macro as reference for followpin creation

options.name: -corePinReferToFollowPin
options.description: M2 followpin generation uses follow pin wire

options.name: -corePinSiteRailWidth
options.description: {site name layer and width} follow pin width at layer for specified site

options.name: -corePinSnapTo
options.description: {M1_pin|opt_routing_track|grid|half_grid} snap M2 followpin referred to M1 pin to position

options.name: -extendNearestTarget
options.description: extend nearest target so that it can be connected

options.name: -jogThresholdRatio
options.description: distance ratio between a jogging target and a straight target

options.name: -layerNormalCost
options.description: {layer1 cost1 layer2 cost2 ...} layer cost of preferred direction

options.name: -layerWrongWayCost
options.description: {layer1 cost1 layer2 cost2 ...} layer cost of non-preferred direction

options.name: -padPinMinViaSize
options.description: Minimum via width percent between pad and ring.

options.name: -padPinSplit
options.description: Split width and spacing for wide pad pins

options.name: -padRingLefConvention
options.description: Keep user LEF input for pad rings

options.name: -secondaryPinMaxGap
options.description: gaps bigger than this variable cause level shifter rail to break for them

options.name: -secondaryPinRailWidth
options.description: width of followpin rail

options.name: -signalPinAsPG
options.description: signal pins as PG pins

options.name: -splitLongVia
options.description: {threshold step offset height} Split vias longer than <threshold> into smaller vias with specified <step> and bottom/left end <offset> and vertical/horizontal <height>

options.name: -srpgAonCellPin
options.description: List of cell/pin information NOT extract from CPF

options.name: -targetNumber
options.description: number of target to connect

options.name: -targetSearchDistance
options.description: target search distance

options.name: -timeLimit
options.description: time limit (in seconds) that the router is allowed in routing each port

options.name: -treatEndcapAsCore
options.description: sroute treat Endcap macro as Core macro

options.name: -treatWelltapAsEndcap
options.description: sroute treat Welltap macro as Endcap macro

options.name: -viaConnectToShape
options.description: {padring|ring|stripe|blockring|blockpin|coverpin|noshape|blockwire|corewire|followpin|iowire} Make via connection to specified shapes

options.name: -viaThruToClosestRing
options.description: A via should connect only to closest ring layer when multiple rings overlap
